question: What is the key purpose of the photo? Select from the following options: (A) To showcase the motorcycle's speed. (B) To showcase the rider's outfit. (C) To showcase the motorcycle's parked location. (D) To showcase the customization of the motorcycle.
gold_answer: To showcase the customization of the motorcycle
answer_choices: To showcase the motorcycle's parked location
To showcase the customization of the motorcycle

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A standard, unmodified motorcycle with no custom parts or unique design features.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: Customized motorcycle parts, unique paint jobs, aftermarket accessories, or modifications.

inpaint_prompt_used: A standard, unmodified motorcycle with no custom parts or unique design features.
